description: Create figure showing k-mer similarity matrix and the systematic TreeGrafter error affecting both reviewed and unreviewed AprA proteins
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive figure showing the k-mer similarity results and the systematic error
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 7))

# Panel A: K-mer similarity heatmap
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title('A. Sequence Similarity (5-mer Jaccard Index)\nQ72DT2 clusters with AprA, not SdhA', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

labels = [
    'Q72DT2\n(DvH AprA)',
    'T2G6Z9\n(Mg AprA)\n[reviewed]',
    'Q59116\n(Af AprA)',
    'P0AC41\n(Ec SdhA)',
    'P31040\n(Hs SDHA)',
    'P00363\n(Ec FrdA)',
]

# 5-mer similarity matrix (computed above)
sim_matrix = np.array([
    [1.000, 0.435, 0.033, 0.002, 0.003, 0.000],  # Q72DT2
    [0.435, 1.000, 0.033, 0.002, 0.002, 0.000],  # T2G6Z9
    [0.033, 0.033, 1.000, 0.002, 0.000, 0.002],  # Q59116
    [0.002, 0.002, 0.002, 1.000, 0.051, 0.034],  # P0AC41 (estimated SdhA-FrdA ~0.034)
    [0.003, 0.002, 0.000, 0.051, 1.000, 0.030],  # P31040
    [0.000, 0.000, 0.002, 0.034, 0.030, 1.000],  # P00363
])

# Make symmetric
sim_matrix = (sim_matrix + sim_matrix.T) / 2

im = ax.imshow(sim_matrix, cmap='YlOrRd', vmin=0, vmax=0.5)
ax.set_xticks(range(6))
ax.set_yticks(range(6))
ax.set_xticklabels(labels, fontsize=7, rotation=45, ha='right')
ax.set_yticklabels(labels, fontsize=7)

# Add text values
for i in range(6):
    for j in range(6):
        val = sim_matrix[i, j]
        color = 'white' if val > 0.25 else 'black'
        ax.text(j, i, f'{val:.3f}', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, color=color)

# Add boxes around AprA and SdhA groups
from matplotlib.patches import Rectangle
ax.add_patch(Rectangle((-0.5, -0.5), 3, 3, linewidth=3, edgecolor='blue', facecolor='none', linestyle='--', label='AprA group'))
ax.add_patch(Rectangle((2.5, 2.5), 3, 3, linewidth=3, edgecolor='red', facecolor='none', linestyle='--', label='SdhA/FrdA group'))

ax.legend(loc='lower left', fontsize=8)
plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, shrink=0.8, label='5-mer Jaccard Similarity')

# Panel B: The systematic error demonstration
ax = axes[1]
ax.set_title('B. Systematic TreeGrafter Misannotation\nSame error on reviewed and unreviewed AprA', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)
ax.axis('off')

text = """REVIEWED AprA: T2G6Z9 (M. gigas)
  Experimentally verified function:
    GO:0009973 adenylyl-sulfate reductase  [IDA:UniProtKB]
    GO:0071949 FAD binding                 [IDA:UniProtKB]
    GO:0019420 dissimilatory sulfate reduction [IDA:UniProtKB]

  TreeGrafter misannotation (SAME BUG):
    GO:0000104 succinate dehydrogenase     [IEA:TreeGrafter]

  PANTHER subfamily (SAME ERROR):
    PTHR11632:SF51 "SUCCINATE DEHYDROGENASE
    [UBIQUINONE] FLAVOPROTEIN SUBUNIT, MITOCHONDRIAL"


UNREVIEWED AprA: Q72DT2 (D. vulgaris Hildenborough)
  Correct annotation (from EC):
    GO:0009973 adenylyl-sulfate reductase  [IEA:UniProtKB-EC]

  TreeGrafter misannotation (SAME BUG):
    GO:0000104 succinate dehydrogenase     [IEA:TreeGrafter]

  PANTHER subfamily (SAME ERROR):
    PTHR11632:SF51 "SUCCINATE DEHYDROGENASE
    [UBIQUINONE] FLAVOPROTEIN SUBUNIT, MITOCHONDRIAL"


CONCLUSION: PANTHER subfamily PTHR11632:SF51 has
a systematic misclassification of AprA proteins.
The TreeGrafter error propagates GO:0000104 to
ALL proteins in this subfamily, regardless of
their actual enzymatic function."""

ax.text(0.05, 0.95, text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8.5,
        fontfamily='monospace', verticalalignment='top',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#fff3e0', alpha=0.9))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('systematic_error_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: systematic_error_analysis.png")
